tickets.problem_description: Interactive element is only 82.0×18.0px — below the 44×44px WCAG minimum. This small size makes the element hard to interact with.

compliance_annotations.clause_text: No person, including any platform, shall design, modify or manipulate any user interface element or form in a manner that has the purpose or substantial effect of subverting or impairing user choice or autonomy, including giving more prominent position or larger visual real estate to particular choices.
compliance_annotations.violation_explanation: The detected 'visual_misdirection' pattern on element 'el_sq5azoqb' potentially violates CCPA Dark Pattern Guidelines 2023 (India) — Guideline 9 — Interface Interference. Matched regulatory keywords: interface.

compliance_annotations.clause_text: Providers of online platforms shall not design, organise or operate their online interfaces in a way that deceives or manipulates the recipients of their service or in a way that otherwise materially distorts or impairs the ability of the recipients of their service to make free and informed decisions.
compliance_annotations.violation_explanation: The detected 'visual_misdirection' pattern on element 'el_sq5azoqb' potentially violates Digital Services Act (EU) — Article 25(1). Matched regulatory keywords: interface.

compliance_annotations.clause_text: The request for consent shall be presented to the Data Principal in a clear and plain language, giving her the choice to give or not give consent, containing particulars of personal data to be processed, the purpose, and rights of the Data Principal.
compliance_annotations.violation_explanation: The detected 'visual_misdirection' pattern on element 'el_sq5azoqb' potentially violates Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 (India) — Section 7(2).

compliance_annotations.clause_text: The placing on the market, the putting into service, or the use of an AI system that deploys subliminal techniques beyond a person's consciousness or purposefully manipulative or deceptive techniques, with the objective, or the effect, of materially distorting the behaviour of a person or a group of persons.
compliance_annotations.violation_explanation: The detected 'visual_misdirection' pattern on element 'el_sq5azoqb' potentially violates EU AI Act — Article 5(1)(a).

tickets.regulatory_clause_plain: CCPA Dark Pattern Guidelines 2023 Guideline 9 — Interface Interference (severity: high); Digital Services Act Article 25(1) (severity: critical); Digital Personal Data Protection Act 2023 Section 7(2) (severity: critical)
tickets.fix_recommendation: Ensure all interactive elements are clearly visible and appropriately sized. Do not use visual tricks to divert attention.
tickets.acceptance_criterion: Verify that the 'visual_misdirection' pattern has been addressed and the element provides a clear, non-manipulative user experience.
